title: glechoma × tmolea
intro: Glechoma × tmolea, also known as Russian sage or a hybrid of the Glechoma genus, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and parts of Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Glechoma × tmolea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine as a tincture or salve to promote healing and relaxation.
